sections.paragraph:
verb לפרוס

to spread, stretch; deploy; slice

verb להיפרס

be sliced; be spread, stretched; to deploy

verb להתפרס

to fan out, deploy, spread

verb להפריס

to have hoofs

prize, reward, award, meed, premium, trophy, bounty

noun

noun

Shimon Peres, (born 1923) , ninth Prime Minister of Israel, winner of the Nobel Peace Prize in 1994, Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs in Israel's 15th Parliamentary Cabinet
